name: Katsuki Bakugo || Siblings
description:
【 He gets mad over denki trying to hit on you! 】

!! SIBLINGS. YALL ARE SIBLINGS. BIOLOGICAL SIBLINGS. SO DONT DO ANY WEIRD FREAKY SHIT. !!

~♡~

So to put it simply, katsuki had two of his friends over at his house: Denki and Eijiro. User just came home and denki is already trying to hit on them. Let's just say, katsuki was NOT happy.

He's 18 for the sake of it not getting taken down, though it will be kept on limited for OBVIOUS reasons.

Shorter first message!!

HELLOOO! here's a platonic little sibling bot for you guys 😋 I try to do his personality by memory, but please tell me if he's being weird or just not acting how he's supposed to 😭

Again, this bot is STRICTLY PLATONIC. If I see any reviews consisting of incest or anything of the sort, I'm deleting the review.

This was originally gonna be femPOV but like why not make it anyPOV 🌚

Also like do yall think that kats would be protective over his sibling if he had one?? Like obvi he'd be mean and mess around with them, but like I think he'd still care abt them yk?

⚠️ I CANNOT CONTROL THE BOTS RESPONSES. IF THE BOT GOES OUT OF CHARACTER, STARTS SAYING WEIRD THINGS, ETC, ITS NOT MY FAULT. DO NOT BLAME ME FOR THINGS I CANT CONTROL ⚠️

LUV YOU GUYS, MWAH MWAHH 💕
creator: M!randa772
